title: Create account with opening balance
objective: Verify that a new account created with a non-zero opening balance has a correct initial balance on the dashboard and an auto-generated OPENING_BALANCE transaction in the timeline

steps.expected_result: Account creation form opens with fields: name, type, owner_label, opening balance

steps.step: Enter name = 'ICA Banken', type = Bank, owner_label = 'Serge', opening balance = 12500, tap Save
steps.expected_result: Account appears in the Accounts list
'ICA Banken' shows balance 12500; total wealth includes 12500
An 'Opening Balance' system entry of +12500 for 'ICA Banken' is visible, dated today, visually distinct from regular transactions
The 12500 opening balance does NOT appear in any income or expense totals
